channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 40 of US-Israeli attacks?
item.description: The US and Iran agree to a two-week truce, just an hour before Trump’s deadline to escalate the conflict expired.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump announces truce, Tehran agrees safe transit in Hormuz
item.description: Iran has claimed victory and says upcoming talks in Pakistan do not mean the end of war is guaranteed.

item.title: In Strait of Hormuz, Iran and China take aim at US dollar hegemony
item.description: Tehran and Beijing both stand to gain from boosting status of the Chinese yuan.

item.title: US ceasefire allows negotiations on Iran’s ‘workable’ 10-point plan
item.description: Donald Trump’s announcement of a two-week ceasefire paves the way for negotiations on Iran's 10-point plan.

item.title: US politicians react to Trump’s Iran ceasefire with caution, relief
item.description: Republican hawks voice scepticism about talks with Tehran as Democrats welcome the truce and call for accountability.

item.title: Iranians commemorate victims of Minab school strike
item.description: Iranians have commemorated the victims of the US strike on a girls school in Minab, that killed 168 people.

item.title: World welcomes US-Iran ceasefire, urges lasting peace in the Middle East
item.description: Countries urge full commitment to two-week ceasefire, praise Pakistan for role in facilitating truce.

item.title: Netanyahu says US-Iran ceasefire ‘does not include Lebanon’
item.description: Israeli prime minister welcomes US decision to suspend attacks on Iran, but says the truce does not apply to Lebanon.

item.title: Iraqis celebrates US-Iran ceasefire as two-week halt in war begins
item.description: Celebrations have erupted in Iraq following the announcement of a two-week ceasefire between Iran and the US.

item.title: Climate activist Greta Thunberg slams Trump’s threats against Iran
item.description: Polls have found that young people in the United States are more sceptical of foreign intervention and war on Iran.
